result.summary: Coupler.io exposes a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.coupler.io/mcp` authenticated with Coupler-issued OAuth 2.0; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surface was found on the given domain.
result.description: Coupler.io is a data integration and analytics platform that connects business data sources to spreadsheets, BI tools, data warehouses, and AI tools. It also offers an MCP-based interface for connecting Coupler-managed data to AI assistants.

coupler_mcp_oauth.label: Coupler.io MCP OAuth client
coupler_mcp_oauth.setup: For the hosted MCP server, use Coupler.io's OAuth 2.0 flow advertised by its authorization-server metadata at [mcp.coupler.io OAuth metadata](https://mcp.coupler.io/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server). Dynamic client registration is exposed at [register](https://auth.coupler.io/oauth2/register); authorization uses [authorize](https://auth.coupler.io/oauth2/authorize) and token exchange uses [token](https://auth.coupler.io/oauth2/token). The advertised scope is `mcp`, and the token endpoint supports public clients (`token_endpoint_auth_methods_supported: none`).
